name: Banaba Leaf Extract
summary: Banaba Leaf Extract is tracked for Corosolic acid-containing extracts may affect glucose transport and insulin signaling; mechanism-only pending stronger human with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed.
